items.briefing:
A cyber breach affecting Canvas, a widely used learning management system, has raised concerns for Australian schools that rely on the platform. Staff and students at affected institutions may have had personal data exposed, so schools should check for any communications from their IT teams or the platform provider. Separately, KnowBe4 has launched a free online hub called CAPY to help Australian families improve their cyber safety awareness at home.

Security researchers have also flagged active exploitation of a critical Cisco SD-WAN vulnerability — if your organisation uses Cisco networking equipment, flag this urgently with your IT team.

**Tip:** Ask your IT team whether your school or organisation uses Canvas or Cisco SD-WAN, and confirm patches or updates are in place.
